command_classes.read_only: Does not touch the live org. Safe for local inspection, export-audit review, and workbook intake.
command_classes.live_read: Reads from the live org but does not mutate assets.
command_classes.mutating: Changes live CRM Analytics assets or other org state and requires a reviewer/executor safety boundary.

lanes.label: Intelligence Control
lanes.summary: CLI-first resolver, router, reviewer, and executor commands above the direct harness surface.

lanes.label: Patch Guardrails
lanes.summary: Static local checks for Wave PATCH safety before any live mutation.

lanes.label: Live Inventory
lanes.summary: Read-only inventory, export, and portfolio-review scripts that inspect deployed dashboards.

lanes.label: Dashboard Mutations
lanes.summary: Direct Wave PATCH or DELETE scripts that change deployed dashboards in the org.

lanes.label: Export Audits
lanes.summary: Local audits that inspect exported dashboard JSON and score design, contract, or persona fit.

lanes.label: Wave Data Validations
lanes.summary: Hybrid or live validations that query Wave datasets or mix exported dashboards with live Salesforce evidence.

lanes.label: Salesforce Data Profiles
lanes.summary: Live Salesforce profiling and semantic assessment scripts that shape dashboard requirements.

lanes.label: Native Surface Authoring
lanes.summary: CLI bundles that turn builder-brain packages into native Salesforce report and dashboard authoring contracts.

lanes.label: Local Intake
lanes.summary: Local-only intake and normalization scripts for workbook and KPI catalog inputs.

scripts.summary: Resolve, route, review, and execute typed CLI intelligence flows over the harness surface.
Retrieve exemplars, draft surfaces, critique revisions, and package execution handoffs for cross-surface analytics builds.
Validates builder-brain CRMA patch payloads and compiles them into ordered Wave PATCH worklists.
Validates and resolves builder-brain follow-up target ids for reports and dashboards.
Stores and retrieves prior harness runs, artifacts, verdicts, and failure fingerprints.
Reads the generated AI OS browser and collection indexes so operators can inspect recent collections and runs.
Builds evidence-first harness execution plans from business goals and registry metadata.
Scores plan evidence and blocks under-evidenced dashboard mutations before executor handoff.
Static Wave PATCH contract lint for raw or normalized dashboard JSON.
Fetches live dashboards and writes page-by-page portfolio review artifacts.
Exports live dashboard JSON plus referenced dataset metadata and XMD.
Scans deployed dashboards for comparison tables and ID-field readiness.
Adds descriptive subtitles to deployed Gen 2 dashboards.
Adds grouped KPI bullet charts to deployed dashboards.
Adds number formatting to deployed number widgets and axes.
Adds conditional formatting rules to deployed comparison tables.
Adds YoY and QoQ variance indicators across deployed dashboards.
Deploys Salesforce record actions to eligible comparison tables.
Enhances the Finance Revenue Operations dashboard in place.
Repairs ACC Navigate dashboard links and layout.
Repairs incomplete columnMap objects on legacy dashboards.
Repairs misclassified marketing filter widgets in live dashboards.
Renames pages and adds filter controls to selected live dashboards.
Surfaces orphaned ML datasets in existing dashboards.
Backs up and deletes Andre-owned dashboards from the live org.
Upgrades the live Executive Revenue and Forecast dashboard in place.
Audits an exported Account Intelligence dashboard snapshot.
Audits an exported BDR campaign control dashboard snapshot.
Audits an exported BDR operating-system dashboard snapshot.
Audits an exported Commercial Rhythm Control Tower snapshot.
Audits an exported Customer Intelligence dashboard snapshot.
Audits an exported Executive Product Mix and Industry snapshot.
Audits an exported Forecast and Revenue Motions snapshot.
Audits an exported Lead Funnel snapshot.
Audits an exported Lead Management snapshot.
Audits an exported Revenue Retention and Health snapshot.
Queries the live BDR_Operating_Rhythm dataset to validate truth-layer integrity.
Combines exported dashboard JSON with live opportunity evidence to validate source-truth revenue logic.
Profiles how BDR work is captured across Salesforce objects.
Profiles BDR field readiness in the live Salesforce org.
Profiles the current BDR operating state from live Salesforce data.
Profiles quote-line product evidence for the BDR universe.
Profiles BDR response-time evidence and SLA measurability.
Profiles renewal outcomes from live Salesforce history.
Profiles renewal ownership patterns from live Salesforce history.
Validates retention semantics on selected live owners.
Determines the correct product grain for retention classification.
Profiles retention semantics from live Salesforce process data.
Profiles commercial role structures from live Salesforce data.
Compiles builder-brain report packages into native Salesforce report authoring bundles.
Compiles builder-brain dashboard packages into native Salesforce dashboard authoring bundles.
Consumes native dashboard filter automation plans, opens the dashboard editor, and snapshots candidate browser refs for post-clone filter authoring.
Extracts a normalized KPI catalog from a workbook provided by ops.
